title: Day 1: Hitting the road
text: Packed up the car and heading south. First stop: Pine Bluff, Arkansas. The excitement is real—and so are the nerves. What will we find when we start asking students about their STEM dreams?

title: First impressions of Pine Bluff
text: The school is smaller than I expected. One hallway, a few classrooms, and a science lab that doubles as storage. But the students? Incredibly sharp and curious. More to come.
